code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
          let toggled = b + 32 - 2 * (b % 32 / 16) * 32
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(toggled)}"
        else
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
